headline: Analysts Estimate Baxter International (BAX) to Report a Decline in Earnings: What to Look Out for
summary: Baxter (BAX) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
